description: Model a commercial building and design a solar array avoiding a rooftop obstruction. Open SketchUp Make 2017. Draw a 40 ft (east-west) by 30 ft (north-south) rectangular building footprint and push/pull it up 12 ft to create a flat-roofed building. On the center of the roof, draw a 6 ft by 6 ft square and push/pull it up 4 ft to create an HVAC unit obstruction. Set the Skelion geographic location to Phoenix, Arizona. Use the Skelion plugin to insert solar panels on the roof surface around the HVAC unit. The panels must be south-facing, in landscape orientation, and have a 10-degree tilt. Ensure that the solar panels cover the available roof space but do NOT overlap or intersect with the HVAC unit. Save the final SketchUp model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\hvac_obstruction_layout.skp'.
